summary: Implemented the attached Create Profile plan without editing the plan file. The modal now includes missing controls using existing UI controls only: Start URL in the header, Location Mode and Accuracy in Network, Port Block Mode and Port Block List in Security, and functional cookie import state in Cookies. HardwareTab was normalized to use stable existing controls and payload extraction. The frontend create payload now sends expanded plan-aligned fingerprint/network/security/location data plus StartURL and cookies. Backend DTOs were expanded, ProfileDataConfig gained Profile/Cookies sections, ProfileService now composes and persists a richer plan-aligned ProfileData JSON while keeping the current DB schema, and ConfigBuilder now reads StartURL from stored profile data. Lints on all edited files are clean.
current_status: Create Profile now stores a substantially more plan-aligned JSON structure inside the existing ProfileData column while preserving the current database schema. UI controls for the missing plan fields are present, payload mapping is expanded, and backend/config generation is wired for StartURL, cookies, location, security, proxy, hardware, and fingerprint overrides.
